title: LinkedIn Experience & Education
content: Experience: Full-stack Senior Software Engineer at Sustainable Infrastructure Systems (Jul 2024 - Present). Team Leader - Composite Technician at Sustainable Infrastructure Systems (Jun 2022 - Jul 2024). Composite Technician at Sustainable Infrastructure Systems (Jan 2022 - Jun 2022). Lead Supervisor at Leadership Dynamics (Aug 2021 - Apr 2022). Excavator Operator at Independent Contractor (Jul 2021 - Aug 2021). Crushing Operator at Independent Contractor (Apr 2021 - Jul 2021). Labourer/Operator at Independent Contractor (May 2017 - Aug 2021). Education: TAFE NSW - Landscape Construction.
